pi_items.source: Web search confirmed this is the official DuckDuckGo v3 onion address.
Task description explicitly instructs to perform a search for 'Tor Project'.
Regex pattern correctly escapes the dot for matching the verified DuckDuckGo v3 domain.
Standard page title expected for the DuckDuckGo search engine.

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly targets the official public DuckDuckGo v3 onion address (duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion). The target URL and the search query 'Tor Project' are explicitly defined in the task description and verifier scripts.
